aether.pro_tips.line.aether.enchant_blue: Normal Quran discs can be transformed into a blue version.

lore.item.aether.music_disc_high: A Quran disc that plays "Surah 86, At-Tariq" by Mahmoud Khalil Al-Hussary.
lore.item.aether.music_disc_klepto: A Quran disc that plays "Surah 98, Al Bayinah" by Mahmoud Khalil Al-Hussary.
